form.formComment: Third race start. First start raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 8 at Redcar on October 17 over 1200m, 2 len behind Harswell Angel carrying 59kg at $8.50. Went for a break before returning 7th of 9 at Pontefract on April 7 over 1200m, 22 len behind Invincible Boy with 60.5kg at $4.50. Strips fitter this time and is a definite top-three hope.

form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last campaign seventh of 13 at Newcastle All Weather September 8 over 1000m, 5 len behind Dark Angel Star carrying 60.5kg at $5. On debut second of 7 at Ayr June 21 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Do Bronxs with 60.5kg at $21. Open to improvement and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 11 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Moscow Power with 58.5kg at $7.50. Rates highly and can break through.

form.formComment: At debut, 5th of 9 at Pontefract on April 7 over 1200m, 9 len behind Invincible Boy carrying 60.5kg at $17. Don't think he will trouble this field.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, 2nd in a small field at Chelmsford on March 7 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Beagle Bay carrying 57kg at $13. Last start 4th of 10 at Southwell All Weather on April 5 over 1400m, 6 len behind Back To Me carrying 58kg at $2.90. Has plenty of upside and can take this out.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At long odds at debut, second last of 11 at Newcastle All Weather on February 24 over 1200m, 9 len behind Seven Fires carrying 57.5kg at $26. Second-up second last of 10 at Southwell All Weather on April 5 over 1400m, 15 len behind Back To Me with 58kg at $41. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Upon leaving the stalls, moved off its intended line.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 11 at Newcastle All Weather on March 19 over 1200m, 4 len behind Farandaway with 58.5kg at $15. Big chance with that race experience to prove invaluable.
